name: (!UPDATED!) Rhodes Island - Forward Unto Dawn - Arknights
description:
(NOT A FORCED DOCTOR POV BOT) [Updated 5/26/2026, added Rhine Labs, Karlan Trade, Dublinn] It is finally out! The comprehensive Rhodes Island bot that will continue to have characters added. This bot will be updated (hopefully) daily in preparation for my birthday on the 13th! This is my gift to you all, so I hope you all enjoy and let me know what you think!

List of intros!:

1: MADE, user being recruited by Amiya and Dobermann

2: MADE!!!, general purpose bot of the Landship

3: MADE, user in the medical department with Folinic and Warfarin

4: MADE, user in the engineering department with Closure and Mechanist

5: MADE, user in the landship after dark, second general purpose

6: MADE, user in the RI Convalescent Garden

7: MADE, Amiya and Kal'tsit in a lungmen café sometime after the chernobog crisis.

8: MADE!!!, a remake of the Chernobog confrontation bot featuring Amiya, Margaret Nearl, Dobermann, Ace, Mina, Talulah, and Crownslayer.

9: UNMADE, no idea what I am gonna do here tbh

10: Open scenario, blank intro

Here is the list of current characters included through the various lorebooks. This bot will also act as the hub for my various mainline lorebooks.
